//: Deno toolchain for the supabase/functions edge functions (A+ Track F). The execution tests (test:edge) run in CI's deno-tests job. lint:edge + check:edge extend static analysis to the highest-trust code in the repo (auth/money trust boundary) — see scripts/validate-edge-functions.mjs for the source-syntax + botGuard contract gate that DOES run in CI today. Edge functions use full https://esm.sh/ URL imports, so no import map is needed. Run: `deno task test:edge` (or the CI `deno-tests` job).
//gate: test:edge keeps --no-check because `deno check` currently surfaces PRE-EXISTING type errors in the edge sources (e.g. stripe-webhook serve(handler) Handler-shape mismatch) that live OUTSIDE this config's reach. check:edge exists so that work can be driven to zero; once it passes, drop --no-check here and add `deno task check:edge` + `deno task lint:edge` to the CI deno-tests job to make them blocking. lint:edge already excludes the auto-generated _shared/*Bundle.js (built by scripts/build-edge-shared.mjs — not hand-written, not lintable).
